name: python3-gevent
title: python3-gevent
summary: gevent is a coroutine-based Python networking library
description:
gevent is a coroutine-based Python networking library
gevent uses greenlet to provide a high-level synchronous API on top of
libevent event loop.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-gevent because gevent is a coroutine-based Python networking library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-gevent as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-gevent with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-gevent --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
